nodes.label: Verbs and Tenses
nodes.description: Understanding action words and when they happen

nodes.label: Action Verbs
nodes.description: Words that show what someone or something does

nodes.label: Visible Actions
nodes.description: Actions you can see: run, jump, write, kick

nodes.label: Invisible Actions
nodes.description: Actions in your mind: think, remember, dream, believe

nodes.label: Finding Verbs
nodes.description: Ask: What is the subject DOING? That word is the verb!

nodes.label: Present Tense
nodes.description: Tells about actions happening now or regularly

nodes.label: Simple Present
nodes.description: For habits and regular actions: I play, She reads

nodes.label: Present Continuous
nodes.description: For actions right now: I am playing, She is reading

nodes.label: Subject-Verb Agreement
nodes.description: The verb must match the subject (singular or plural)

nodes.label: Add -s or -es
nodes.description: For he/she/it: play becomes plays, wash becomes washes

nodes.label: No Change
nodes.description: For I/you/we/they: play stays play, wash stays wash

nodes.label: Signal Words
nodes.description: Words that hint at present tense: always, every day, right now, usually

nodes.label: Adding -ing
nodes.description: For continuous tense: run becomes running, eat becomes eating
